title: rubus varius
intro: Rubus varius, also known as the variable raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus varius include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
